title: PlasmaZones Animation Curve
description: A named easing curve: a factory typeId plus its numeric parameters. The 'name' field is enforced separately by the loader's filename-envelope check (it must equal the file's base name), so it is optional here and the schema validates both the on-disk file and the envelope-stripped root.

typeId.description: Curve factory id resolved by CurveRegistry (e.g. cubic-bezier). Unknown ids are rejected at load by the registry, not here.

parameters.description: Factory-specific numeric parameters (e.g. x1/y1/x2/y2 for cubic-bezier).
